transcript_facts:
- [Findings] okay alright so i'm gon na do a physical exam for you right now your vital signs look good your pulse is okay and yeah your pulse ox is normal so that's good you do n't appear in any distress you may be might be a little bit nervous to come in and see me but looks pretty good i do not appreciate any rash on your body there is no angioedema which is just swelling of your lips like you mentioned no audible stridor which is a bad noise in your airway when it gets swollen so that's good news if you just want to take a deep breath listening to your lungs on your lungs exam i do appreciate some faint expiratory wheezing bilaterally in all lung fields so i know you had a chest x-ray when you came in i'm looking at that chest x-ray right now and your pulmonary function test and they were both normal so let's talk a little bit about what i think is going on for your first problem you have newly diagnosed allergic asthma so i want you to continue the albuterol inhaler i do n't want you to wait until your symptoms flare up or are bad take it as soon as you start to feel any symptoms at all i'm gon na prescribe something else called singulair ten milligrams you might have seen some commercials for it
- [Findings] i also am gon na proceed with allergy testing have you ever had an allergy test before okay we'll start with skin testing and we'll see if we can target what the triggers in hopes in hopes that we can avoid any any other management and this can be successful if we ca n't figure out what it is from that we'll have to discuss more testing in your blood and do immunotherapy so i wan na see you next week to schedule the skin testing do you have any questions for me
- [History of Present Illness] thanks so do you thank you you you're feeling short of breath okay is there you know is there any other symptoms that you have with that i get like you know mid shortness of breath suddenly for some reason i'm not quite sure why
- [History of Present Illness] i always think it's allergies
- [History of Present Illness] crazy uh the last time it happened i went to the urgent care and they gave me a nebulizer that helped okay great do you ever notice a rash with any of this do you have any nausea vomiting
- [History of Present Illness] i mean i diarrhea quite a bit once i go out heavy drinking yeah do you ever get lip or throat swelling have you ever had any issues with allergies in the past hmmm what situations do you notice the symptoms come on when is it when you're near your cat or outside the house
- [History of Present Illness] do you do you have any symptoms now well which is no no travels and no symptoms right now
- [History of Present Illness] you take that once daily and that's gon na help decrease the occurrences of your asthma
- [Plan] they prescribed me an inhaler that i use now when i feel the symptoms coming on
